title: phyteuma ovatum subsp. ovatum
intro: Phyteuma ovatum subsp. ovatum, also known as Alpine Cottongrass or Woolly Ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the Campanulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyteuma ovatum subsp. ovatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or ointments, and can be applied topically or consumed as a dietary supplement.
